entries.name: newsletter-send-scheduled
entries.purpose: Every minute: scan NewsletterCampaign rows where state=pending AND scheduled_at <= now(). Dispatch SendNewsletterCampaignJob for each.

entries.name: newsletter-refresh-audiences
entries.purpose: Hourly: refresh audiences with cache_refreshed_at older than 6h. Keeps segments current.

entries.name: newsletter-reputation-monthly
entries.purpose: Monthly 1st @ 09 UTC: email reputation report to each newsletter's owner.

entries.name: newsletter-prune-unengaged
entries.purpose: Daily 04 UTC: soft-delete pending_confirmation past TTL; flag long-unengaged actives for admin review.
